CC=clang CXX=clang++ CFLAGS_FOR_BUILD="-Os -std=gnu99 -fno-integrated-as" CXXFLAGS_FOR_BUILD="-Os -std=gnu++11 -fno-integrated-as -fbracket-depth=512" CFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-Os -mthumb" CXXFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-Os -mthumb" CPPFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-I/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/include/arm-linux-androideabi" LDFLAGS_FOR_TARGET="-Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/lib" ../gcc-8.5.0/configure --prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --target=arm-linux-androideabi --program-suffix=-8 --with-gmp=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpc=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --with-mpfr=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr --disable-libsanitizer --with-gcc-major-version-only --with-system-zlib --disable-nls --enable-threads --disable-bootstrap --enable-multiarch --disable-multilib --disable-tls --with-arch=armv7-a+simd --with-tune=generic-armv7-a --with-float=softfp --with-mode=thumb --enable-default-pie --enable-default-ssp --with-stack-clash-protection-guard-size=12 --enable-link-mutex --enable-__cxa_atexit --enable-gnu-indirect-function --enable-initfini-array --disable-sjlj-exceptions --enable-fix-cortex-a53-835769 --enable-fix-cortex-a53-843419 --enable-linker-build-id --with-linker-hash-style=gnu --with-boot-ldflags="-specs=/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sources/termux-packages/scripts/termux.spec -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc" --with-sysroot=/data/data/com.termux/files --with-build-time-tools=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local/arm-linux-androideabi/bin --with-local-prefix=/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/local --enable-languages=c,c++
